# useCounter

Basic counter with utility functions.

**Package:** `@vueuse/shared`
**Category:** Utilities

## Usage

```ts
import { useCounter } from '@vueuse/core'

const { count, inc, dec, set, reset } = useCounter()
```

## Returns

| Name | Type |
| --- | --- |
| count | `shallowRef` |
| inc | `Ref` |
| dec | `Ref` |
| get | `Ref` |
| set | `Ref` |
| reset | `Ref` |

## Reference

[VueUse Docs](https://vueuse.org/core/useCounter/)
